overall.description: Gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit walking through an indoor lounge with red ambient lighting, then exiting to a bright outdoor industrial settlement with metal walkways, pipes, and an open-air market area with NPCs.

tall orange stools arranged near the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an indoor lounge illuminated by red ambient lighting. A pool table sits to the right while a seated NPC occupies a table on the left. The character moves steadily toward a large window marking the exit at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior metal ramp and elevated industrial walkway

events.description: exiting the indoor lounge through the doorway into the outdoor industrial area
lighting shifts from artificial red indoor lighting to bright natural daylight

agents.ego_description: walking up the exterior metal ramp and along the elevated industrial walkway

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the railing

entered.detail: sloped metal ramp with diamond plate surface leading upward
large cylindrical industrial pipes running vertically along the structure
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
metal framework and platforms of the surrounding industrial buildings
door frame marking the transition from indoor to outdoor space

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building into bright daylight, ascending a metal ramp surrounded by industrial pipes and scaffolding. A security guard stands near the railing as the character walks up to the upper level of the settlement, with the lighting dramatically shifting from red artificial to natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market dining area with tables and service stalls

events.description: entering the populated market area with dining tables and service counters

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area past dining tables and other pedestrians

standing near the dining tables in the background

entered.detail: metal tables with stools arranged for outdoor dining
large industrial shipping container with warning markings
fabric canopy stretched overhead providing partial shade
curved metal bar with illuminated edges for food and drink service
red and black safety poster mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling open-air market area shaded by camouflage netting. Metal dining tables and service counters line the path while several NPCs walk through the area. Industrial structures remain visible in the background as the character moves through the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, red-lit interior lounge into a bright, bustling industrial settlement. It begins with the character walking past a pool table and a seated NPC, moving steadily toward a large window at the far end of the room. As the character exits the building, the lighting dramatically shifts from artificial red to natural sunlight while the camera ascends a metal ramp surrounded by scaffolding and industrial pipes. The scene then opens into a bustling open-air market shaded by camouflage netting, passing by metal dining tables and service counters. Finally, the camera glides through the settlement past various NPCs with towering industrial structures remaining visible in the background.
